sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82791" key="petro/koitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρό-κοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bed of rock</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εὐνά</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
